title: Aureline effective control-stack row and matrix packet
description: Boundary schema for the effective control-stack matrix packet used to explain settings, policies, experiments/flags, and emergency kill switches. The packet is the local-offline proof: a reviewer can reconstruct the effective value / allow / deny decision from the packet alone, without reading implementation code or logs. Every surface (settings UI, CLI inspect, diagnostics, support export) projects the same rows rather than recomputing a narrative. Rows are export-safe: they carry typed vocabulary, timestamps, schema refs, and opaque evidence refs; raw policy bodies, raw signatures, raw URLs/hostnames/paths, raw tenant identities, tokens, and secret material never cross this boundary. Adding a new enum value or optional field is additive-minor and bumps the document const schema version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

effective_control_stack_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this control-stack vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

stable_dot_id.description: Dot-separated stable identifier used for control ids and matrix ids.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short, export-safe sentence suitable for UI banners, CLI output, diagnostics, and support exports. Raw secrets, raw policy bodies, raw signatures, raw URLs/hostnames, raw paths, and tenant identities MUST NOT appear.

control_surface.description: Which control surface the matrix is explaining.

control_authority.description: Frozen control-authority class. Names which control layer or emergency authority produced this row.

lifecycle_label.description: Cross-surface lifecycle label. Settings rows typically use experimental/beta/stable/deprecated/retired; experiments/flags may additionally use labs/preview/disabled_by_policy.

offline_fallback.description: Local-offline fallback posture for this row at the moment of evaluation.

schema_ref.description: URI or repo-relative reference to the schema contract backing this row (for example, schemas/settings/effective_setting.schema.json).

opaque_evidence_ref.description: Opaque, export-safe evidence reference. Raw payload bytes, raw secrets, and raw policy bodies never appear here.

row_relation.description: How this row relates to the effective decision. winner identifies the effective row; capped identifies a row that requested a broader value but was narrowed by a ceiling; blocked identifies a row refused due to mismatch/invalidity; expired identifies a time-bounded row outside its validity window.

rank_low_to_high.description: Rank in the precedence ladder. Higher rank overrides lower rank unless capped by a safety ceiling.

source_label.description: Export-safe source tag for this row (for example, 'Aureline default', 'Admin policy bundle v3', 'User settings').

current_value.description: Export-safe projection of the current branch/value for this layer.

last_refresh_at.description: Monotonic stamp of the last time this row's source was refreshed/evaluated; null if not applicable.

expires_at.description: When this row's binding expires; null if unbounded.

explain_why_ref.description: Opaque handle the 'Explain why' affordance resolves against. Null is admissible only when the row is purely informational and no explainer is available.

evidence_refs.description: Export-safe evidence references backing this row (policy cache entry ids, decision explain record ids, signed bundle ids, audit event ids).

effective_outcome_class.description: Outcome class for the matrix packet. value_resolved is used when the decision is a value; allowed/denied for gates; disabled/narrowed for ceilings and kill-switch outcomes; degraded_to_fallback when last-known-good or safe default behavior is in effect.

matrix_id.description: Stable id for this explain packet instance (used for support exports and local caching).

effective_value.description: Export-safe projection of the final effective value or outcome detail; null is admissible only when effective_outcome is unavailable_with_reason.

rows.description: Ordered rows describing the ladder and any ceilings. At least one row is present for embedded_default.
